30: 
31: 		dotIndex := strings.LastIndex(r.URL.Path, ".")
32: 		switch dotIndex {
33: 		case -1:
34: 			// For all paths without an extension serve /index.html
35: 			r.URL.Path = "/"
36: 
37: 		default:
38: 			switch r.URL.Path {
39: 			case "/", "/favicon.png", "/assets/styles.css":
40: 
41: 			default:
42: 				for i := dotIndex + 1; i < len(r.URL.Path); i++ {
43: 					intVal := r.URL.Path[i]
44: 					// Current guidance from FE is if it's only alphanum after
45: 					// the last dot, treat it as an extension
46: 					if intVal < '0' ||
47: 						(intVal > '9' && intVal < 'A') ||
48: 						(intVal > 'Z' && intVal < 'a') ||
49: 						intVal > 'z' {
50: 						// Not an extension. Serve the contents of index.html
51: 						r.URL.Path = "/"
52: 					}
53: 				}
54: 			}
55: 		}
56: 
57: 		// Fall through to the next handler
58: 		nextHandler.ServeHTTP(w, r)
59: 	})
60: }

(End of file - total 60 lines)
</content>
